mapper.select: SELECT FROM merchant_shop_change c JOIN merchant m ON m.id=c.merchant_id WHERE c.merchant_id=#{merchantId} AND c.region=#{region} AND c.target_shop_id=#{shopId} AND c.status IN (0,1) ORDER BY c.id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT 0 AS id,s.merchant_id,0 AS operator_id,m.company_name AS merchant_name,s.region, 2 AS change_type,s.id AS target_shop_id,s.updated_at AS base_updated_at, s.category_id,s.city_id,s.area_id,s.name,s.cover_url,s.phone,s.price_per_capita, s.currency,s.address,s.latitude,s.longitude,s.business_hours,s.summary,s.open_now, COALESCE(s.tags,'') AS tags,0 AS status,'' AS reject_reason,0 AS audit_by, NULL AS submitted_at,NULL AS audited_at,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS created_at, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS updated_at FROM shop s JOIN merchant m ON m.id=s.merchant_id WHERE s.id=#{shopId} AND s.merchant_id=#{merchantId} AND s.region=#{region} AND s.is_deleted=FALSE
SELECT FROM merchant_shop_change c JOIN merchant m ON m.id=c.merchant_id WHERE c.id=#{changeId} AND c.region=#{region} AND c.status=1 FOR UPDATE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO shop_photo(shop_id,image_url,photo_type,sort_no) SELECT #{shopId},image_url,photo_type,sort_no FROM merchant_shop_change_photo WHERE change_id=#{changeId} ORDER BY sort_no,id
INSERT INTO dish(shop_id,name,price,recommend_reason,sort_no) SELECT #{shopId},name,price,recommend_reason,sort_no FROM merchant_shop_change_dish WHERE change_id=#{changeId} ORDER BY sort_no,id
mapper.select: SELECT updated_at FROM shop WHERE id=#{shopId} AND merchant_id=#{merchantId} AND region=#{region} AND is_deleted=FALSE FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE shop SET category_id=#{categoryId},city_id=#{cityId},area_id=#{areaId},latitude=#{latitude}, longitude=#{longitude},name=#{name},cover_url=#{coverUrl},phone=#{phone}, price_per_capita=#{pricePerCapita},currency=#{currency},address=#{address}, business_hours=#{businessHours},summary=#{summary},open_now=#{openNow},tags=#{tags}, updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id=#{targetShopId} AND merchant_id=#{merchantId} AND region=#{region} AND is_deleted=FALSE

UPDATE merchant_shop_change SET status=2,target_shop_id=#{targetShopId},audit_by=#{auditBy},audited_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, reject_reason='',updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id=#{changeId} AND region=#{region} AND status=1
UPDATE merchant_shop_change SET status=3,audit_by=#{auditBy},reject_reason=#{reason},audited_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id=#{changeId} AND region=#{region} AND status=1

UPDATE merchant_shop_change SET status=0,reject_reason='',audit_by=0,audited_at=NULL,operator_id=#{operatorId}, updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id=#{changeId} AND merchant_id=#{merchantId} AND region=#{region} AND status=3

UPDATE merchant_shop_change SET operator_id=#{operatorId},category_id=#{categoryId},city_id=#{cityId},area_id=#{areaId}, name=#{name},cover_url=#{coverUrl},phone=#{phone},price_per_capita=#{pricePerCapita}, currency=#{currency},address=#{address},latitude=#{latitude},longitude=#{longitude}, business_hours=#{businessHours},summary=#{summary},open_now=#{openNow},tags=#{tags}, updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id=#{id} AND merchant_id=#{merchantId} AND region=#{region} AND status=0

UPDATE merchant_shop_change SET status=1,operator_id=#{operatorId},submitted_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id=#{changeId} AND merchant_id=#{merchantId} AND region=#{region} AND status=0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO merchant_shop_change_photo(change_id,image_url,photo_type,sort_no) SELECT #{changeId},image_url,photo_type,sort_no FROM shop_photo WHERE shop_id=#{shopId}
INSERT INTO merchant_shop_change_dish(change_id,name,price,recommend_reason,sort_no) SELECT #{changeId},name,price,recommend_reason,sort_no FROM dish WHERE shop_id=#{shopId}
mapper.select: SELECT id,change_id,image_url,photo_type,sort_no AS sort FROM merchant_shop_change_photo WHERE change_id=#{changeId} ORDER BY sort_no,id
SELECT id,change_id,name,price,recommend_reason,sort_no AS sort FROM merchant_shop_change_dish WHERE change_id=#{changeId} ORDER BY sort_no,id
